publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-12-15 23:25:26 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Posters promoting X-rated movies. Includes a number of films directed by Henri Pachard, Harold Lime, and Leon Gucci; and films starring Joanna Storm, Ron Jeremy, Candida Royalle, Annie Sprinkle, and Eric Edwards, among many others. Also, pressbooks with ordering information for certain movie posters.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Posters for pornographic movies, #7761. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Starring Sharon Thorpe, Leslie Bovee, Semantha King, Candida Royalle, John Leslie Dupre, and Ken Cotton. Directed by Howard Perking. Produced by Bill Steele.
